description.p: You have great potential, said to rival the six eyes

sheet.description: You have the Zenin Clan’s praised technique, said to rival the six eyes.

description.p: Beginning at 1st level, you have the prized technique of the Zenin clan, the ten shadows earned to summon Shikigami from the shadows. As an action for 1 Cursed Energy, you can summon up to 2 Divine Dogs(1 CE per dog) within 10 ft of you. Your Divine Dogs last for 1 hour, until they are reduced to 0 hit points or you dismiss any summoned shikigami as a bonus action while within line of sight. Alternatively, as a reaction to seeing your shikigami reduced to 0 hit points, you can unsummon them as a reaction and cannot summon them again until you finish a long rest.

Your shikigami cannot use actions on their own. You can spend a bonus action to command your shikigami and can also spend an action to order them to do something more specific for longer, such as protect that creature, grab that, defend that area, etc. The number of Shikigami you can control at once is equal to half your level(rounded up).

sheet.description: Summon up to 2 Divine Dogs(1 CE per dog) within 10 ft of you. Your Divine Dogs last for 1 hour, until they are reduced to 0 hit points or you dismiss any summoned shikigami as a bonus action while within line of sight. Alternatively, as a reaction to seeing your shikigami reduced to 0 hit points, you can unsummon them as a reaction and cannot summon them again until you finish a long rest. Your shikigami cannot use actions on their own. You can spend a bonus action to command your shikigami and can also spend an action to order them to do something more specific for longer, such as protect that creature, grab that, defend that area, etc. The number of Shikigami you can control at once is {{dd:level}}.

description.p: Once you reach the 3rd level, you have gained access to your other spirits, and you must face them in ritual combat alone to gain access to them. As an action, you can summon an untamed Shikigami within 30 ft of you without spending cursed energy. Any creature within 50 feet is considered participating in the ritual. An untamed shikigami will be berserk (attack the nearest creature), but if you have defeated the shikigami alone (not including your shikigami) and reduce it to 0 hit points, you can now summon the shikigami normally. You can summon a number of shikigami at a time equal to half your level rounded up (Divine Dogs and Rabbits count as one entity).
If reduced to 0 hit points during a trial with multiple participants, you do not make death saving throws until all participants are unconscious.

sheet.description: Summon an untamed Shikigami within 30 ft of you without spending cursed energy. Any creature within 50 feet is considered participating in the ritual. An untamed shikigami will be berserk (attack the nearest creature), but if you have defeated the shikigami alone (not including your shikigami) and reduce it to 0 hit points, you can now summon the shikigami normally. You can summon a number of shikigami at a time equal {{dd:level}} (Divine Dogs and Rabbits count as one entity).

description.p: Starting at 6th level, you've learned to make use of your ability to manipulate shadows, allowing you to form an extra dimensional space to hide your things and even manipulate the shadows of others.

Shadow Storage: You can store objects in an extra-dimensional space within your shadow. You can physically place something into your shadow, costing no cursed energy. However you must spend 1 cursed energy to interact with an object in this space, potentially removing it. Everything in your shadow counts for your carrying capacity. Additionally, you can trap creatures within your shadow. As a bonus action for 2 ce, you can force a creature to make a Dexterity (Acrobatics) check against your CE save DC. This check is made at Disadvantage if they are in complete darkness or inside a veil, and automatically fail within your domain. On a failure they are trapped inside your shadow, counting for carrying capacity. They can hold their breath for a number of minutes equal to their Constitution modifier (min of 1) before suffocating. They can make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw at the end of their turns, freeing themselves on a success and appearing prone in an unoccupied space within 5 ft.

sheet.description: You can physically place something into your shadow, costing no cursed energy. yYou must spend 1 cursed energy to interact with an object in this space, potentially removing it. Everything in your shadow counts for your carrying capacity. Additionally, you can trap creatures within your shadow. As a bonus action for 2 ce, you can force a creature to make a Dexterity (Acrobatics) check against your CE save DC. This check is made at Disadvantage if they are in complete darkness or inside a veil, and automatically fail within your domain. On a failure they are trapped inside your shadow, counting for carrying capacity. They can hold their breath for a number of minutes equal to their Constitution modifier (min of 1) before suffocating. They can make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw at the end of their turns, freeing themselves on a success and appearing prone in an unoccupied space within 5 ft.

description.p: Starting at 14th level, when you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.

sheet.description: When you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.
